member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TesterTypeHandler
member.summary: Manages all logic related to obtaining the current tester type. In case the current tester type stored in SysCUserVars.SC_MODULE_TYPE is invalid, the tester type will be assumed as undefined. This common class is intended to be used by LotStartDatalog test method and LotEndFinalize test methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TesterTypeHandler.Initialize(Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService)
member.summary: Initalizes services used by .

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.TesterTypeHandler.GetTesterType
member.summary: Obtains the current tester type value from SysCUserVars.SC_MODULE_TYPE. Then checks if its valid, otherwise it will return an undefined tester type.
member.returns: Tester type if valid, otherwise undefined.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.FooterLevel3
member.summary: Manages all logic related to level 3 for ituff footer.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.FooterLevel3.FooterLevel3Format
member.summary: Gets the level3 Ituff format.

member.summary: The level3 Footer formatter.

member.summary: Gets or sets the PassCounters for this lot.

member.summary: Gets or sets the Hard Bins for this lot.

member.summary: Clear the interal data.

member.summary: Gets or sets the dbinctr token.

member.summary: Gets or sets the total token.

member.summary: Gets or sets the enddate token.

member.summary: Manages all logic related to level 4 for ituff footer.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.FooterLevel4.DatetimeFormat
member.summary: Represents the datetime format that ituff can support. This is used for generating timestamps with the right format.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The session context of this operation.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.FooterLevel4.FooterLevel4Format
member.summary: Gets the level3 Ituff format.

member.summary: Gets the level3 Ituff format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IFooterLevel
member.summary: Interface implements basic methods for footer levels. Getting the footer string and building each footer.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IFooterLevel.BuildFooter
member.summary: Method builds the footer for the respective level.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel7Footer(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 7 footer is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 7 footer values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 7 footer format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel6Footer(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 6 footer is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 6 footer values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 6 footer format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel5Footer(System.Text.StringBuilder)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 5 footer is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 5 footer values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 5 footer format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel4Footer(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotEndDatalog.FooterLevel4Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 4 footer is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 4 footer values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 4 footer format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotEndDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel3Footer(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotEndDatalog.FooterLevel3Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 3 footer is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 3 footer values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 3 footer format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PrimeLotEndDatalogTestMethod
member.summary: PrimeLotEndDatalogTestMethod is in charge of all Lot end related data logging.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PrimeLotEndDatalogTestMethod.LotFooterTimeKey
member.summary: Represents shared storage key where the lot footer end time is saved.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PrimeLotEndFinalizeTestMethod
member.summary: PrimeLotEndFinalizeTestMethod is in charge of doing any necessary logic after a Lot run is completed.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PrimeLotEndFinalizeTestMethod.#ctor(Prime.TestProgramService.ITestProgramService,Prime.TelemetryService.Internal.ITelemetryService,Prime.TesterService.Internal.ITesterService,Prime.UserVarService.IUserVarService)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Implementation of IApplicationAssembliesUtilities.

member.summary: Gets the level3 Ituff format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IApplicationAssembliesUtilities
member.summary: Provides mechanism for resolving and retrieving distinct application assemblies.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IApplicationAssembliesUtilities.GetDistinctApplicationAssemblies
member.summary: Retrieves a collection of distinct application assemblies.
member.returns: Collection of unique assemblies used by the application.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IApplicationAssembliesUtilities.GetVersionInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves version information for the specified file.
member.param: The full path to the file for which version information is requested. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: A object containing the version information for the specified file.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IHeader
member.summary: Interface implements basic methods for header levels. Getting the header string and building each header.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IHeader.BuildHeader
member.summary: Method builds the header for the respective level.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotStartDatalogExtensions
member.summary: Class to define extendable methods.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotStartDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel7Header(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotStartDatalog.HeaderLevel7Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 7 header is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 7 header values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 7 header format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotStartDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel6Header(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotStartDatalog.HeaderLevel6Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 6 header is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 6 header values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 6 header format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotStartDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel5Header(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotStartDatalog.HeaderLevel5Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 5 header is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 5 header values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 5 header format.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.ILotStartDatalogExtensions.ModifyLotLevel4Header(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotStartDatalog.HeaderLevel4Format)
member.summary: Called at execute once level 4 header is built. Method to be implemented by user to modify level 4 header values before they are printed out. This allows the user to modify this level as desired, for example adding new items or modifying existing ones. Default implementation outputs basic working level 4 header format.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities
member.summary: Provides utility methods for working with version strings.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.IsEngineeringVersion(System.String)
member.summary: Returns bool if the version is engineering version.
member.returns: True if version is engineering version.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.GetPrimeAssembliesVersionCount(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Gets dictionary of versions and their counts.
member.param: Dictionary of Prime assemblies' names and their versions.
member.returns: Dictionary of versions and their counts.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.GetPrimeAssembliesVersions
member.summary: Gets dictionary of Prime assemblies' names and their versions.
member.returns: Dictionary of Prime assemblies' names and their versions.
member.exception: Thrown when an assembly does not have a version string.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.GetPrimeAssembliesWithDifferentOfficialVersion(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Gets HashSet of assemblies with different official version than Prime version, together with their versions.
member.param: Dictionary of Prime assemblies' names and their versions.
member.returns: HashSet of assemblies with different official version than Prime version, together with their versions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.GetPrimeAssembliesWithEngineeringVersion(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},System.String)
member.summary: Gets HashSet of assemblies with engineering version different than Prime version, together with their versions.
member.param: Dictionary of Prime assemblies' names and their versions.
member.returns: HashSet of assemblies with engineering version different version than Prime version, together with their versions.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.IVersionUtilities.GetPrimeVersion(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Int32})
member.summary: Returns Prime version, based on the highest version count.
member.param: Dictionary of versions and their counts.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PcatLevel4Variables
member.summary: Class manages loading and formatting Pcat level 4 variables into given level 4 lot level for printing.

member.name: M:Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.PcatLevel4Variables.ProcessPcatVars(Prime.TestMethods.LotSession.LotStartDatalog.HeaderLevel4Format)
member.summary: Method adds to the logLevel supplied the Pcat variables strings for printing to ituff.
member.param: Current log level to add Pcat strings to.

member.summary: PrimeLotStartDatalogTestMethod is in charge of all Lot start related data logging.

member.summary: Represents shared storage key where the lot footer end time is saved.

member.summary: Represents the datetime format that ituff can support. This is used for generating timestamps with the right format.
